caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Turks & Caicos is experiencing 22 kt winds and 5.3 ft wave heights with a dominant swell direction from the NE and 95% rain probability, while Grand Cayman has 17 kt winds. I expect the heavy rain to be the main impact in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in Turks & Caicos, with less severe conditions in Grand Cayman in the Western Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Haifa
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 13 kt and wave heights of 6.6 ft, while Mykonos is seeing winds of 20 kt, making for a challenging day in the Eastern Mediterranean. Mykonos' stronger winds may prompt a Small Craft Advisory, but Haifa's heavy rain is the more significant concern for port operations today.
